title: White leaf
body:
# 📜 About
This mod creates a new kind of whitelist. You can add players to whitelist for a specific amount of time.

# 📟 Commands
```
/wtadd <nick> <time>      # add a player to whitelist for a sertain amount of time;
/wtprlng <nick> <time>    # prolong player's whitelist time;
/wtrem <nick>             # remove player from whitelist;
/wtcheck <nick>           # see how much time is left for a player to be whitelisted.
```

All commands have permission level of 2, which mean you have to be an operator or a console to execute all those commands.

# 🕓 Time format
You can use s, m, h, d, M, Y letters for seconds, minutes, hours, days, months and years respectively. So the command `/wtadd Steve 1M` will add player Steve to whitelist for 1 month (30 days).

# ⚠️ Important
This whitelist has nothing to do with the original Minecraft's one. If you enable Minecraft's whitelist player would need to be in both of them to play. It is recommended to disable whitelist in server settings.


This mod is created for my personal use and it is extremely raw and simple. That means it has all kinds of bugs and issues, but hey, it works)
